name: Deck Combo
short_description: Deck Combo - An overhead view game where the player on a card board arranges his squad in the form of cards that advance, fighting enemy squads, trying to storm the enemy castle and get the victory.
detailed_description:
Battles take place on a card board where you as the king, control your squad and try to withstand the enemy's assault, while at the same time, storming the enemy castle.

Deck Combo - An overhead view game where the player on a card board arranges his squad in the form of cards that advance, fighting enemy squads, trying to storm the enemy castle and get the victory.

Game Features:

- Visual style

- Interesting Mechanics

- High Difficulty
